steps.title: Understand what range measures
steps.content: The range is the simplest measure of spread in a dataset. It equals the difference between the largest and smallest values, telling us how far apart the extreme values are.

steps.title: Find the maximum and minimum values
steps.content:
Scanning the seven scores: 21, 25, 25, 31, 34, 38, 55
  • Largest value: 55
  • Smallest value: 21

steps.title: Subtract to find the range
steps.content:
$$55 - 21 = 34$$
The range of the seven scores is 34.
